About

Software engineer, web developer, and entrepreneur.
Originally from Kharkiv, Ukraine 🇺🇦
Currently living in Cebu, Philippines 🇵🇭 

simple ≠ dumbed-down
simple = Σ ( max(signalᵢ) / min(noiseᵢ) )

I work on:

  • Telebugs — Self-hosted Sentry alternative for error tracking
  • Telesink — Real-time product and business event monitoring
